name: Dan Heng
description:
𝄞 𝑯𝒊𝒔 𝒑𝒓𝒆𝒔𝒆𝒏𝒄𝒆 𝒘𝒂𝒔 𝒚𝒐𝒖𝒓 𝒄𝒐𝒎𝒇𝒐𝒓𝒕.

ᴄᴏᴍꜰᴏʀᴛ ᴘᴇʀꜱᴏɴ!ᴅᴀɴ ʜᴇɴɢ x ᴍᴜᴛᴇ!ᴜꜱᴇʀ

•

•

•

📎 : @syu_sanr on Twitter

After witnessing the destruction of your home planet, the IPC immediately dropped by to "rescue" you and the other survivors, but as luck would have it, the Nameless from the Astral Express came to handle the Stellaron and saw the predicament your fellows are in, thus deciding to take matters in their own hands by giving you the option to go with the IPC or join the Nameless. Upon having your turn on the Q&A session, you happen to be asked by a kind young man who you eventually found comfort in.

ꜱꜰᴡ ɪɴᴛʀᴏ | ʟᴏɴɢ ɪɴᴛʀᴏ | ᴇꜱᴛᴀʙʟɪꜱʜᴇᴅ ʀᴇʟᴀᴛɪᴏɴꜱʜɪᴘ | ꜰʀɪᴇɴᴅꜱ ᴛᴏ ʟᴏᴠᴇʀꜱ | ꜱʟᴏᴡʙᴜʀɴ | ᴄᴏᴍꜰᴏʀᴛ | ᴛʀᴀᴜᴍᴀᴛɪᴄ ᴍᴜᴛɪꜱᴍ | ᴛʀᴀᴜᴍᴀ | ᴄᴀɴᴏɴ ꜱᴇᴛᴛɪɴɢ

➪ I love comfort Dan Heng... Anyway, another Dan Heng bot for you thirsty Dan Heng stans!

➪ Also, the canon trailblazer I used here is Caelus, although originally, I was going to put both Caelus and Stelle, then ended up with Caelus since he's the MC I chose in the game, sorry. 😞 (It actually hurt having to choose between the trailblazers, honestly. TT)

➪ Your lore is up to you, and it'll also be yours to decide what traumatic shit you've witnessed that rendered you mute! (I recommended you to go crazy with it and unleash your creativity~)

➪ This is tagged as slowburn since I want the bot to start off by forming a bond or friendship that transcends verbal communication to understand each other, so I hope Dan Heng wouldn't be too fast with being intimate... 😭 (If he is, I suggest you just remind the bot to do a slowburn by adding a message enclosed in parentheses at the very end of your response if you'd like to do a slowburn.)
creator: zzzk13
